issues.description: Trigger is incorrect; should be 'EndOfTurn' for '[End of Your Turn]' timing
Missing condition to check 'If you have 3 or less Life cards' - requires HasCardOnBoard or custom life count condition
Action 'PlaySelf' is incorrect; should be 'Rest' to set a Character as active, or a more specific activation action
Missing target specification for '{Egghead} type Character with a cost of 5 or less'

suggestedDsl.effectText: [End of Your Turn] If you have 3 or less Life cards, set up to 1 {Egghead} type Character with a cost of 5 or less as active.
